name: RPlog_When_It_Rains_It_Pours_-_Part_2
title: Salty Jack Recruits a Cabin Boy
summary: Back at the New Alderaan starport, the Quarren captain Salty Jack reunites with his Calamari first mate Barnacle Bill and introduces a ragged young human stowaway, Kit, whom he recruits to the crew and bunks at the local inn. After the introductions and Bill's good-natured bossing, Jack relays the details of his earlier encounter with the Twi'lek agent: an offer of a light freighter that comes with strings, requiring them to work for an unseen master at a lavish, credit-rich compound. Wary of answering to anyone he cannot see, Jack weighs the deal against their pending New Republic prospects while reminiscing with Bill about old firefights on Dac. Sensing both opportunity and danger, the pair resolve to scout the Zhao compound on foot to learn what they can about their mysterious would-be employers.
